title: Implement metrics collection for simulation harness
description: Add metrics collection capabilities to the simulation harness including latency, delivery rate, and collision statistics. Should track per-node and aggregate metrics with time-based reporting.
close_reason: Superseded by the metrics implementation in sim/metrics.py + Simulation integration + REST GET /sim/{id}/metrics. See 4r8/xep. Tests in tests/sim/test_metrics.py and tests/sim/test_api.py.
